data.title: Algorand's price may reach $0.16-$0.19 in 4-6 weeks, showing a potential 19-42% gain from oversold conditions. RSI at 56.25.

data.title: GA Telesis disassembles 737-800 aircraft in Fort Lauderdale, showcasing its Ecosystem™.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on January 13, 2026, GA Telesis, LLC (GAT) highlighted the effectiveness of the GA Telesis Ecosystem™ by demonstrating its integrated solutions provided by its Flight Solutions Group (FSG) following the successful disassembly of a 737-800 aircraft. This significant acquisition showcases the company's commitment to maximizing efficiency and quality within its operations.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson wins partial legal victory as court orders reevaluation of $1B damages in Auris case. Acquisition of Auris health for $3.4B in cash with up to $2.35B in contingent payments. Lawsuit claimed J&J struggling to develop Verb surgical robot. Visit Benzinga.com for full story.
data.description: Johnson & Johnson recently won a partial legal victory as Delaware's highest court overturned a portion of a $1 billion damages award related to its purchase of Auris Health in 2019 for $3.4 billion in cash. The court set aside part of a September 2024 judgment favoring former Auris shareholders who claimed J&J struggled to develop its surgical robot, Verb. The lawsuit alleged that J&J saw Auris as a solution due to Verb's delays and strategic importance of surgical robotics. The company may pay additional contingent payments of up to $2.35 billion based on specific milestones. This ruling marks a significant development in J&J's legal battle surrounding its acquisition of Auris Health.

data.title: Travere Therapeutics suffers stock crash due to potential delay for Filspari kidney disease treatment.
data.description: Shares of Travere Therapeutics experienced a significant drop on Tuesday after news surfaced about a possible delay for its drug, Filspari, in the treatment of a kidney disease. Investors reacted swiftly to the uncertainty surrounding the medication, resulting in a considerable decrease in the company's stock value. This unexpected setback has raised concerns among stakeholders, and the situation is being closely monitored. The delay of Filspari has created a challenging scenario for Travere Therapeutics as they navigate through this obstacle in their efforts to bring the drug to market.

data.title: Trump Admin invests $1B in L3Harris, acquires missile business stake. LHX stock hits record high.
data.description: The Trump Administration plans to inject $1 billion into L3Harris and acquire ownership in the spinoff of its missile business. Following this announcement, LHX stock skyrocketed to its highest level ever. The surge in L3Harris' stock was fueled by news of the $1 billion investment from the Department of Defense and the upcoming initial public offering of its missile division.

data.title: Data centers fuel energy deals with geothermal agreement, meeting demand for AI tech.
data.description: The growing demand for data centers has resulted in a rise in long-term energy agreements, with the latest being a deal focusing on geothermal energy. This trend is driven by the increasing need for data processing and storage capabilities, with companies exploring various sources for sustainable energy solutions. The agreement highlights the industry's commitment to incorporating renewable energy sources, such as geothermal power, in their operations. This shift toward cleaner energy sources demonstrates a proactive approach towards environmental sustainability.

data.title: Reddit stock initiated with buy rating on growth potential in advertising and AI by Evercore ISI. Characters: 86
data.description: A buy rating was given to Reddit stock by Evercore ISI due to its potential for advertising growth. The coverage initiation highlighted the company's promising advertising growth and AI potential. It was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Nursing Economic$ Foundation opens 2026 scholarship applications with four $5,000 scholarships for grad nurses.
data.description: In Pitman, New Jersey, an announcement was made on January 13, 2026, that the Nursing Economic$ Foundation has opened applications for its scholarship program this year. The foundation is providing an opportunity for registered nurses who are pursuing master's or doctoral nursing programs to apply for one of the four scholarships worth $5,000 each. The intention behind these scholarships is to offer support to nurses in advancing their education and careers in the field of nursing.

data.title: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries partners with Automotive Edge Computing Consortium to improve data processing. #AECC #MitsubishiHeavyIndustries
data.description: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Ltd. (MHI), a key provider of integrated infrastructure solutions for data centers, has recently become a member of the Automotive Edge Computing Consortium (AECC). This organization, focused on enhancing communication and computing infrastructure to boost automotive efficiency, welcomes MHI to its ranks. The AECC aims to improve the utilization of automotive systems through collaboration and best practices. This move further consolidates the consortium's position in the industry.

data.title: SuperAwesome buys Starglow Media, world's largest family audio content provider, expanding youth engagement.
data.description: In a recent development, SuperAwesome has acquired Starglow Media, known as the world's largest ecosystem of premium kids and family audio content. This acquisition is set to bolster SuperAwesome's youth engagement capabilities significantly.

data.description: Worldcoin (WLD) is currently experiencing a positive trend as indicated by its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 56.38 and its price above significant moving averages. Technical analysis forecasts a potential target of $0.73 if the current resistance level is surpassed.

data.title: Optimism (OP) poised to hit $0.36-$0.38 by February, with current price at $0.34 and RSI at 63.49, nearing Bollinger Band resistance. Technical breakout signals support the potential price targets.
data.description: The current market sentiment for Optimism (OP) is positive as it demonstrates a strong bullish trend, trading at $0.34 per unit, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 63.49. The price is hovering close to the upper resistance level of the Bollinger Bands. Analysts predict that if the crucial resistance barrier is breached, the price could surge towards the range of $0.36 to $0.38 per unit in the upcoming 2 to 4 weeks. This indicates potential growth in the near future for OP, based on technical indicators.

data.title: Report analyzes valuation implications of domestic rare earth supply chain reshoring, focusing on leading mining and processing beneficiaries.
data.description: The report titled "Valuation Implications of Domestic Rare Earth Supply Chain Reshoring: A Market and Corporate Analysis of Leading Mining and Processing Beneficiaries" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. In a world where technological independence is highly valued, this report provides insights into the market and corporate aspects of leading mining and processing beneficiaries in the rare earth supply chain reshoring industry. The report offers valuable analysis in this field.

data.title: Royal Gold shares updates on Q4 2025 stream segment sales, balance sheet, non-core assets, and Q4 results release.
data.description: Royal Gold, based in Denver, has given an update on their Q4 2025 Stream Segment Sales, Balance Sheet, and Non-Core Asset Rationalization. They also announced details regarding the release of their Q4 2025 results. The company reported strong numbers in their stream segment sales and emphasized efforts to optimize their balance sheet through non-core asset rationalization. Investors can expect detailed financial results for Q4 2025 to be released soon.

data.title: AARP Pennsylvania warns of 5 scams targeting older adults in 2026, urging vigilance against evolving fraud tactics.
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on January 13, 2026, AARP is cautioning residents to remain vigilant as they enter the new year against five potential scams aimed at older adults. Experts in fraud prevention are highlighting the increasing sophistication of traditional scams and the emergence of novel deceptive tactics. The organization is emphasizing the importance of staying informed and being cautious to protect against financial exploitation.

data.title: SAS Viya now on Microsoft Azure Gov for US public sector, speeding security, data protection.
data.description: In a recent development on January 13, 2026, in Cary, North Carolina, public sector entities, along with their partners and systems integrators, have access to a new deployment option that enhances security and data protection. This advancement comes as more government agencies transition to cloud services. This option allows for faster deployment of the data and artificial intelligence platform, offering advanced capabilities to secure sensitive information. The move aims to streamline processes and safeguard data more effectively in the evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) is experiencing a turnaround with cleanup nearing completion, balance sheet strengthening, and core businesses accelerating towards 2026 expansion.
data.description: Austin, TX - On January 13, 2026, Golden Triangle Ventures (OTC: GTVH) released a corporate update indicating a strategic transition into its next phase. The company is nearing completion of the final tasks related to legacy cleanup efforts while also bolstering its financial standing. Moreover, they are ramping up activities within their key operational sectors to enhance growth opportunities.
